email_threads.subject: Kitchen tile — vendor options
email_threads.preview: Two ranges, ceramic and porcelain. Lead time on the porcelain is 11 days. Need a call by Friday.

email_threads.subject: Drywall schedule slipping
email_threads.preview: Crew pushed by a day. New target Tuesday. Plumbing rough-in still on Friday.

email_threads.subject: Architect invoice #4 — March milestones
email_threads.preview: March milestones invoiced. Permit revision the only outstanding item.

email_threads.subject: Permit revision filed
email_threads.preview: City accepted the rev. Inspection window opens Wednesday.

email_threads.subject: Re: Kitchen tile — vendor options
email_threads.preview: Going with the porcelain. Ordered today.

email_threads.subject: Inspector confirmed Wednesday
email_threads.preview: 10:00 Wednesday. He'll need access to the basement.
